samples.xml_description:
<module id="parallel2serial">
    <description>Parallel to serial converter, where every four input bits are converted to a serial one bit output (from MSB to LSB).</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operations.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="d" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit parallel data input.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Valid signal indicating the availability of serial output.</output>
        <output id="dout">Serial output representing the converted data.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Assigns the most significant bit of the parallel input to the serial output (dout). On each clock cycle, if the counter (cnt) is 3, indicating the last bit of the parallel input, the module updates the data register (data) with the parallel input (d), resets the counter (cnt) to 0, and sets the valid signal (valid) to 1. Otherwise, the module increments the counter (cnt) by 1, sets the valid signal (valid) to 0, and shifts the data register (data) one bit to the left, with the most significant bit shifted to the least significant bit. Counter Register: If the reset signal (rst_n) is high, the register (cnt) is incremented by 1.</implementation>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="dout" value="data[3]" />
        <assign id="valid_out" value="valid" />
    </logic_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <always_comb id="data">
            <if condition="cnt == 3">
                <assign id="data" value="d" />
            </else>
            <else>
                <assign id="data" value="{data[2:0], data[3]}" />
            </else>
        </always_comb>
        <always_comb id="cnt">
            <if condition="!rst_n">
                <assign id="cnt" value="cnt + 1" />
            </else>
        </always_comb>
        <always_comb id="valid">
            <if condition="cnt == 3">
                <assign id="valid" value="1" />
            </else>
            <else>
                <assign id="valid" value="0" />
            </else>
        </always_comb>
    </logic_description>
</module>
